notes: Phase 0 backlog only. Phases 1–3 are scaffolded as placeholder epics at the bottom.
USER-TEST tasks insert validation checkpoints every ~5 atomic tasks.
Dependency IDs reference the 'id' field of prior tasks.
Each task lists the source PRD and ADR(s) it derives from.
Effort estimates in hours. Total MVP estimate: ~340h.

tasks.title: Scaffold Next.js 15 + TypeScript strict monorepo
tasks.description: Bootstrap Next.js 15 App Router app with TS strict, route groups (marketing|app|ops|api), Tailwind, ESLint, Prettier.
tasks.details: tsconfig: strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitOverride. Route groups created empty. ESLint config blocks deep cross-context imports. Tailwind config includes design-language tokens (paper, ink, accent, positive, warning, blocking).
tasks.testStrategy: Build succeeds; `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` exit clean.
tasks.completedNotes: Next 15.5, React 19.2, TypeScript 6, Tailwind 4, Vitest 4 installed. Route groups (marketing|app|ops|api) scaffolded with placeholder pages. Design-language tokens encoded in tailwind.config.ts + src/app/globals.css (light + dark). Custom no-restricted-imports ESLint rule enforces context-public-surface boundary. Smoke test (12 assertions) verifies route groups and configs exist. All three quality gates pass.

tasks.title: Configure Drizzle + Postgres + Neon dev branch
tasks.description: Install Drizzle, configure Neon DB connection, create migrations directory, write initial empty schema.
tasks.details: drizzle.config.ts targets Neon. Migration scripts: `db:generate`, `db:migrate`, `db:studio`. Per-worker schema strategy documented for tests.
tasks.testStrategy: Smoke test: `npm run db:migrate` against dev branch succeeds.

tasks.title: Wire Cloudflare R2 storage adapter
tasks.description: Configure AWS SDK v3 against R2 endpoint; create per-environment buckets; pre-signed URL helper with 15-min expiry.
tasks.details: src/shared/infra/storage/r2.ts exports putObject, getSignedUploadUrl, getSignedReadUrl. Versioning enabled at bucket level via Terraform/console.
tasks.testStrategy: MinIO container in CI; integration test uploads, signs, downloads, asserts content matches.

tasks.title: Set up Inngest client + dev server
tasks.description: Install Inngest, configure Vercel adapter route at /api/inngest, register dev server in `npm run dev`.
tasks.details: src/shared/infra/inngest/client.ts. Workflow files co-located in contexts. Dev server runs via `npx inngest-cli@latest dev` concurrently with Next dev.
tasks.testStrategy: Hello-world workflow fires and completes locally.

tasks.title: Set up Sentry + Axiom logging
tasks.description: Sentry on browser + server + Inngest. Axiom transport for structured logs and audit-log mirroring.
tasks.details: Sentry init wrapped behind src/shared/infra/observability/. Axiom client emits to a single dataset; sampling rules per environment.
tasks.testStrategy: Trigger a thrown error in dev; appears in Sentry dev project. Trigger a log; appears in Axiom.

tasks.title: Configure Vitest + Playwright + Testing Library
tasks.description: Install test stack, configure parallel-safe Postgres schemas, add CI workflow.
tasks.details: vitest.config.ts with global setup/teardown for per-worker schemas. Playwright config with three role-scoped projects (anonymous, customer, ops). GitHub Actions workflow runs unit + integration on PR.
tasks.testStrategy: `npm test` runs in parallel without DB conflicts; sample Playwright spec passes on CI.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Foundation works end-to-end
tasks.description: Validate that scaffolding is sound before building product code.
tasks.details: Verify: `npm run dev` starts cleanly. Sample DB migration applies. Sample upload to R2 works. Sample Inngest workflow fires. Sample Sentry/Axiom event captured. CI is green on a placeholder PR.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual checklist; no production code yet.

tasks.title: Wire Clerk for customer accounts
tasks.description: Install Clerk, configure middleware for (app) route group, set up sign-in / sign-up pages.
tasks.details: Email + Google OAuth. Sign-in/up pages themed to design language (override Clerk default styling). Middleware redirects unauthed (app) traffic to sign-in.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: sign up → sign in → access (app); unauth user is redirected.

tasks.title: Configure Clerk staff org with roles
tasks.description: Create internal Clerk org. Define roles: coordinator, analyst, validator, admin. MFA required.
tasks.details: Roles defined in Clerk dashboard. Middleware for (ops) route group requires org membership + role. Role enum in code: src/shared/infra/auth/roles.ts.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: org member without role cannot access (ops); analyst can; admin can manage roles.

tasks.title: Build Actor resolver + context-layer authorization
tasks.description: Resolve Clerk user to typed Actor (Customer | StaffUser); enforce permissions inside contexts, not only middleware.
tasks.details: src/shared/infra/auth/actor.ts. Every context method accepts an `actor` parameter and checks permissions via a `can(actor, action, resource)` helper.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for `can()`; integration test rejects forbidden actions from a route handler.

tasks.title: Customer + StaffUser DB tables and sync
tasks.description: Drizzle schema for `customers` and `staff_users`; webhook handler for Clerk user lifecycle events.
tasks.details: On user.created webhook → upsert customer or staff_user keyed by clerkUserId. Webhook is idempotent.
tasks.testStrategy: Replay a Clerk webhook event twice; one row created.

tasks.title: Theme tokens + design system primitives
tasks.description: Tailwind config with design-language tokens; shadcn/ui components themed (button, dialog, input, etc.); custom typography stack loaded.
tasks.details: Custom @font-face for GT Sectra, Söhne, Berkeley Mono (with proper fallbacks). Component primitives in src/app/_components/ui/. CTA pattern (magazine underline) implemented as a reusable component.
tasks.testStrategy: Storybook (or simple /ui-kit page) renders each primitive; visual diff baseline captured.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Auth works end-to-end + design system reviewed
tasks.description: Validate auth flows and design taste before scaling marketing pages.
tasks.details: Verify: customer signup/signin works; staff org gating works; design taste review passes (against DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md) by reviewing /ui-kit and Clerk overrides.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual checklist + design review.

tasks.title: Build homepage (editorial hero + sections)
tasks.description: Implement / page per PRD 05 hierarchy: editorial hero, proof statement, three-movement explainer, anti-positioning, pull-quote, footer.
tasks.details: Server-rendered. Lighthouse target: ≥95 across all categories. One full-bleed documentary photo (placeholder until real photo budget). Single accent CTA.
tasks.testStrategy: Lighthouse CI gate ≥95; Playwright screenshot baseline; A11y audit (axe-core) clean.

tasks.title: Build /how-it-works
tasks.description: Three-stage explainer (Recovery → Prep → Concierge) with editorial typography.
tasks.details: Mirrors hero rhythm of homepage. Each stage is a typeset 'movement' with hairline rule between sections.
tasks.testStrategy: Lighthouse ≥95; A11y clean; design review passes.

tasks.title: Build /pricing
tasks.description: Stage-by-stage ladder, tabular figures, no 'popular' badge, free tier rendered with same weight as paid.
tasks.details: Pricing data sourced from src/contexts/billing/pricing.ts (single source of truth).
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot test against pricing.ts; Lighthouse ≥95.

tasks.title: Build /trust + /trust/sub-processors
tasks.description: Long-form editorial trust posture page; canonical promise; 'what we are not' list; sub-processors list (vendor name, purpose).
tasks.details: Real footnote markup. Disclosures rendered as actual text. Sub-processor list as a typeset table; updated within 14 days of changes per policy.
tasks.testStrategy: A11y clean; design review passes.

tasks.title: Footer + global trust footnote pattern
tasks.description: Footer component with trust link, status link, and 'not legal advice' real footnote pattern.
tasks.details: Reusable component used on every marketing + app page.
tasks.testStrategy: Component test renders footnote; integration: footer present on every public route.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Marketing site live at staging
tasks.description: Walk through marketing site from a fresh user perspective; confirm taste is right.
tasks.details: Deploy to staging. Founder + at least one outside reviewer walks through homepage → how-it-works → pricing → trust. Document feedback as new tasks.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review + Lighthouse CI dashboard check.

tasks.title: Screener domain logic + branching engine
tasks.description: src/contexts/screener/branching.ts — pure function: (answers) → next question or completion. Versioned (v1).
tasks.details: 10-question branching from PRD 01. Estimator function also versioned. Comprehensive table-driven unit tests for every branching path.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover every branch; ≥95% coverage on branching.ts.

tasks.title: Screener UI — one-question-per-screen flow
tasks.description: Build /screener route flow: question screen, transitions, persistence (sessionStorage + DB on completion).
tasks.details: Question rendered in GT Sectra display. Top-right `Q3 / 10` mono indicator. Resumable within 7 days via emailed magic link.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: complete a happy-path screener; complete with backtracking; resume after refresh.

tasks.title: Refund estimator (v1)
tasks.description: Pure function from screener answers → refund estimate range + confidence label.
tasks.details: Versioned constants. Confidence rules documented inline. Result records the version used.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests against fixture answer sets; result object schema validated.

tasks.title: Email capture + magic-link resume
tasks.description: Final step captures email; sends magic link via Resend that resumes the session.
tasks.details: Cloudflare Turnstile gate on email submission. Lead row created in DB.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: complete screener, receive magic link in dev mailbox, click, see results.

tasks.title: Results dossier UI
tasks.description: Build results page: hero refund metric (Berkeley Mono, large), confidence label, qualification verdict, prerequisites, recommended next step CTA.
tasks.details: Disqualified variant: respectful, opt-in to future updates. Photographable design — design review required.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot test for layout; A11y; Playwright happy path; design review.

tasks.title: Screener persistence + lead row
tasks.description: Drizzle schema: `screener_sessions`, `leads`. Result jsonb includes versioned estimator output.
tasks.details: 30-day retention for incomplete sessions; 12 months for completed-without-purchase leads.
tasks.testStrategy: Migration applies; integration test creates session + lead.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Real screener walkthrough
tasks.description: Run a real (non-staff) user through the screener; observe and capture confusion points.
tasks.details: Have at least 2 real importers run through. Observed feedback becomes tasks. Confirm results page looks photographable.
tasks.testStrategy: User testing; confusion points captured as new tasks.

tasks.title: Resend integration + React Email setup
tasks.description: Install Resend, configure transactional sending domain, set up React Email render pipeline.
tasks.details: src/shared/infra/email/. Render → HTML/text via React Email. DKIM/SPF on sending domain.
tasks.testStrategy: Send a test email to a dev address; render snapshot test for the template.

tasks.title: Lifecycle workflow #1 — screener-completed
tasks.description: Inngest workflow fires on screener completion; sends results dossier email.
tasks.details: Email links back to results page. Workflow is idempotent.
tasks.testStrategy: Workflow test: trigger event → assert email step ran with correct payload.

tasks.title: Lifecycle nudge cadence (24h, 72h)
tasks.description: Inngest schedules at 24h and 72h post-screener if no purchase; sends nudge templates.
tasks.details: Cancellation if purchase event arrives.
tasks.testStrategy: Workflow test: simulate time advance; assert correct emails fire and stop on purchase.

tasks.title: Stalled-case cadence (48h, 96h, day-7)
tasks.description: Per PRD 04 stalled state: cadence after recovery purchase if no docs uploaded.
tasks.details: Each fire records audit row.
tasks.testStrategy: Workflow test with simulated time advance.

tasks.title: Lifecycle templates 4–9
tasks.description: Build remaining lifecycle templates: recovery purchased, missing docs, entry list ready, prep ready, concierge upsell, day-14 re-engagement.
tasks.details: All in React Email; restrained typography; inline accent links.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot tests per template.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Lifecycle emails reviewed
tasks.description: Read every lifecycle template top-to-bottom; check tone is restrained, real-text, no banners.
tasks.details: Founder + ops review. Capture rewrites as new tasks.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review.

tasks.title: Stripe SDK integration + webhook handler
tasks.description: Install Stripe, set up webhook route /api/stripe/webhooks, idempotent event handling.
tasks.details: Dedupe by Stripe event id (Postgres unique index). All handlers wrapped in transactions.
tasks.testStrategy: Replay same event twice — only one DB effect.

tasks.title: Pricing ladder in code (pricing.ts)
tasks.description: src/contexts/billing/pricing.ts — types, ladder, tier-determining function, success-fee config.
tasks.details: PRICE_LADDER, SUCCESS_FEE_RATES, determineTier. Fully unit-tested.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover SMB / mid-market boundaries; success-fee math; clamp logic.

tasks.title: Stripe catalog sync script
tasks.description: Deploy-time script that reconciles pricing.ts with Stripe products/prices; archives obsolete prices.
tasks.details: Run via `npm run stripe:sync`; idempotent. Logs every diff.
tasks.testStrategy: Run twice — second run is no-op.

tasks.title: Checkout sessions for each SKU
tasks.description: Server actions to create Checkout sessions for Recovery Kit, Service, CAPE Prep Standard, Premium, Concierge Base.
tasks.details: Includes success/cancel URLs; metadata carries case id and SKU; idempotency keys.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: hit Checkout, complete in test mode via Stripe CLI, webhook updates case.

tasks.title: Payment aggregate + audit ledger
tasks.description: Local `Payment` table mirrors Stripe charges/refunds/credits; success-fee invoicing logic; audit log entries.
tasks.details: Idempotent on Stripe event id. Refund clamp logic for success fee.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for happy path, refund, success-fee clamp.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: End-to-end purchase in test mode
tasks.description: Complete a real Checkout for each SKU; confirm webhook → case state transitions cleanly.
tasks.details: Use Stripe test cards. Verify Payment row created, case state advances, no duplicates on webhook replay.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual end-to-end + Stripe CLI replay.

tasks.epic: E6. Case state machine + audit log
tasks.title: Drizzle schema for cases + audit_log
tasks.description: Tables: `cases`, `audit_log` (append-only, no DELETE permission via RLS).
tasks.details: audit_log fields: id, caseId, actorId, kind, fromState, toState, payload jsonb, occurredAt. RLS denies DELETE for all roles.
tasks.testStrategy: Migration applies; attempted DELETE on audit_log fails.

tasks.epic: E6. Case state machine + audit log
tasks.title: XState case machine — states + transitions
tasks.description: src/contexts/ops/case-machine.ts encoding all 16 states + guarded transitions per PRD 04.
tasks.details: Pure machine, no I/O. Side effects declared as named actions.
tasks.testStrategy: Model-based tests via @xstate/test cover every transition.

tasks.epic: E6. Case state machine + audit log
tasks.title: Case service — transition() with audit logging
tasks.description: Public surface in src/contexts/ops/index.ts: transition(caseId, event, actor) → result. Wraps machine + persists state + writes audit row.
tasks.details: Single transactional write. Fires Inngest event on success.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: invalid transitions rejected; valid transitions persist + audit row exists.

tasks.epic: E6. Case state machine + audit log
tasks.title: Audit log mirror to Axiom
tasks.description: On every audit_log insert, mirror to Axiom dataset.
tasks.details: Best-effort mirror; never blocks the transactional write. Failures retried via Inngest.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: row appears in Axiom within 5s.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: State machine governance
tasks.description: Verify no code path can change case.state outside the machine. Confirm audit log captures everything.
tasks.details: Code review + grep for direct writes to cases.state. Ops staff review the audit log UX.
tasks.testStrategy: Static analysis + manual review.

tasks.title: Document table + provenance schema
tasks.description: Drizzle schema for `documents` and `recovery_sources`; document keys scoped to case id.
tasks.details: Versioning enabled; immutable. Provenance fields per PRD 07.
tasks.testStrategy: Migration; integration test creates document with valid key shape.

tasks.title: Pre-signed upload endpoint + client
tasks.description: POST /api/uploads → returns pre-signed PUT URL with 15-min expiry; client uploads direct to R2.
tasks.details: Type-restricted (PDF, XLSX, CSV, EML). Per-customer quota for paid tier.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: request URL, upload file, document row created on completion.

tasks.title: Upload UI component (drag-drop, multi-file)
tasks.description: Reusable upload component with preview list, retry, error states.
tasks.details: Accent-colored progress bar; restraint per design language.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: drop multiple files, confirm all upload.

tasks.title: Document viewer (PDF preview, zoom, pagination)
tasks.description: PDF viewer component for ops side-by-side workflow.
tasks.details: Use react-pdf or pdfjs-dist. Page nav, zoom, search.
tasks.testStrategy: Component test renders sample PDF; e2e: ops user opens case → viewer renders.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Upload + viewer flow
tasks.description: Upload several real documents; view them in ops console; confirm provenance recorded.
tasks.details: Manual.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual.

tasks.title: Recovery routing module (broker/carrier/ACE)
tasks.description: src/contexts/recovery/routing.ts — determineRecoveryPath + recoveryPlanFor.
tasks.details: Per ADR 015. Plan content snapshot-tested.
tasks.testStrategy: Table-driven tests for path determination; snapshot tests for plan content.

tasks.title: Outreach kit templates (broker, carrier, ACE)
tasks.description: Personalized email templates per path; tokenized variables (company name, dates).
tasks.details: Stored in src/contexts/recovery/templates/. Versioned.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot tests; rendered preview matches expected.

tasks.title: Customer recovery workspace UI (3-pane)
tasks.description: Build /app/case/[id]/recovery — left: status+checklist; center: outreach kit; right: upload.
tasks.details: Status banner anchored; design language enforced.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: customer purchases recovery → workspace renders with correct path content.

tasks.title: Ops recovery view + side-by-side viewer/form
tasks.description: Build /ops/case/[id] — three-pane with PDF viewer + extraction form.
tasks.details: Keyboard shortcuts (j/k/v/e/s). Berkeley Mono on numbers.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright with ops role: open case, navigate via keyboard, save extraction.

tasks.title: Manual entry-extraction form + provenance write
tasks.description: Form for analyst to enter entry fields; saves with sourceRecordId; audit log records actor.
tasks.details: Drag-region copy from PDF (P1 polish — basic copy/paste in MVP).
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: save entry → row exists with sourceRecordId + audit row.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Full recovery workflow
tasks.description: Simulate a paid Recovery Service case from purchase through entry list ready.
tasks.details: Customer purchases; uploads docs; analyst extracts; case transitions to entry_list_ready; customer notified.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end Playwright + manual review.

tasks.title: Entry record schema + Drizzle table
tasks.description: Drizzle schema for `entries`, `entry_source_records`; canonical entry-number column with unique index per case.
tasks.details: Per PRD 07 entity definitions.
tasks.testStrategy: Migration + integration test inserts valid entry.

tasks.title: Entry-number canonicalization function
tasks.description: src/contexts/entries/canonicalize.ts — strips whitespace, normalizes separators, validates CBP format.
tasks.details: Pure function, fully unit-tested with edge cases.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover known good/bad/edge formats.

tasks.title: Dedupe + fuzzy match
tasks.description: Exact-match dedupe on canonicalized number; fuzzy match on (date + IOR) within tolerance flagged for analyst.
tasks.details: Surface 'review pair' UI in ops workspace.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit + integration tests against fixture sets.

tasks.title: Window + phase tagging
tasks.description: Tag every entry with IEEPA window status and phase flag; window version pinned per batch.
tasks.details: Window dates centralized in a single config.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests cover boundary dates.

tasks.title: ACE CSV parser
tasks.description: Parse user-uploaded ACE export CSVs into entry candidates with high source-confidence.
tasks.details: Use papaparse + Zod schema. Rejects malformed rows with structured error.
tasks.testStrategy: Golden-file tests against anonymized ACE fixture CSVs.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Ingestion handles real-world ACE export
tasks.description: Run a real (anonymized) ACE export through ingestion; verify dedupe, window-tagging, confidence scoring.
tasks.details: Manual review of resulting entries table.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual.

tasks.title: CAPE Zod schema
tasks.description: src/contexts/cape/schema.ts — entry row schema, batch schema, ReadinessReport schema.
tasks.details: Per ADR 014 + PRD 03.
tasks.testStrategy: Schema tests cover happy + 5+ edge cases each.

tasks.title: Validator with severity-leveled issues
tasks.description: Validator function: entries → ReadinessReport with blocking / warning / info issues.
tasks.details: All validation rules per PRD 03 §Validation rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Golden-file tests against fixture batches in tests/fixtures/cape/ (clean, dupes, mixed-phase, malformed-date, missing-prereq).

tasks.title: CSV builder (CBP-compliant)
tasks.description: Generate CAPE-spec CSV from validated entries; handles leading-zero quoting; filename pattern.
tasks.details: Rejects when blocking issues present.
tasks.testStrategy: Golden-file CSV output diffed against expected.

tasks.title: Batch entity + grouping logic
tasks.description: Batch table; auto-suggested grouping based on phase + recommended size threshold.
tasks.details: Premium tier auto-suggests; Standard tier shows recommendation as info.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for grouping; integration: create batch from entries.

tasks.title: QA checklist + analyst sign-off gate
tasks.description: Required checklist enforced server-side; analyst sign-off transitions case to submission_ready.
tasks.details: Sign-off records validator id, timestamp, note. Audit row written.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: missing item → sign-off rejected; complete → case advances.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Validator passes/fails on real fixtures
tasks.description: Run validator against five fixture types; confirm blocking/warning/info classifications match expectations.
tasks.details: Manual + golden-file diff.
tasks.testStrategy: Test suite + manual review.

tasks.title: React PDF setup + masthead component
tasks.description: Install @react-pdf/renderer; build masthead with case ID, customer, date, analyst.
tasks.details: Custom font registration for GT Sectra + Berkeley Mono in PDF context.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot test of rendered PDF buffer.

tasks.title: Hero metric + entry table + prerequisites
tasks.description: PDF body sections: hero count line, typeset entry table with status glyphs, prereq checklist.
tasks.details: Berkeley Mono numerics; hairline rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot + golden-file PDF comparison.

tasks.title: Footnotes, signed footer, disclosures
tasks.description: Real footnote markup; signed analyst footer with timestamp; canonical trust footer text.
tasks.details: Disclosures appear as real footnotes.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual diff and text-extraction assertion.

tasks.title: Artifact generation pipeline + R2 storage
tasks.description: On QA sign-off: generate CSV + PDF, upload to R2, return signed URLs to customer.
tasks.details: Workflow via Inngest; idempotent.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: sign-off → artifacts present in R2 → email sent with signed URL.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Photographable Readiness Report
tasks.description: Generate a real Readiness Report; confirm it would survive being forwarded to a CFO without changes.
tasks.details: Founder + design reviewer assess.
tasks.testStrategy: Subjective + design review.

tasks.title: Engagement letter templates + version registry
tasks.description: Concierge engagement letter (markdown source); version registered in src/contexts/billing/agreements/.
tasks.details: Each signed copy records the version.
tasks.testStrategy: Render template; assert required clauses present.

tasks.title: E-sign flow integration
tasks.description: Integrate e-signature provider (DocuSign API or similar) into Concierge purchase; payment captured only after signature.
tasks.details: Webhook on signature completion → Stripe captures payment → case transitions concierge_active.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end Playwright with provider sandbox.

tasks.title: /trust/security page + sub-processor automation
tasks.description: Security page documenting auth, storage, retention; sub-processor list rendered from a single source list.
tasks.details: Updates trigger lifecycle email to active customers (Phase 1).
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot + A11y; design review.

tasks.title: Customer data export + deletion endpoints
tasks.description: Customer can request and receive full JSON export; deletion processed within 30 days.
tasks.details: Audit log records deletion event without retaining content.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: request export → JSON delivered; request deletion → records purged after worker run.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Trust posture review
tasks.description: Read /trust pages, engagement letter, and Readiness Report disclosures top-to-bottom.
tasks.details: Founder + outside reviewer (lawyer if available).
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review.

tasks.title: Queue list page + filters + saved views
tasks.description: /ops route — queue list with state, SLA timer, owner; filters; saved views.
tasks.details: Berkeley Mono, dense layout, design-language compliance.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright with ops role; snapshot test.

tasks.title: Case workspace shell (3-pane layout)
tasks.description: Three-pane shell for case workspace; left action panel, center work surface, right document/audit/comments.
tasks.details: Adaptive based on case state — different center surface per state.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: navigate states, confirm correct surface renders.

tasks.title: Case timeline + audit log viewer
tasks.description: Right-pane component rendering case state transitions + actor + timestamp.
tasks.details: Pure read of audit_log table.
tasks.testStrategy: Component test with fixture audit log.

tasks.title: Case claim / release / assignment
tasks.description: Coordinator can claim/release/reassign cases; one-keystroke claim.
tasks.details: CaseAssignment table; conflict resolution on simultaneous claim.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration: two staff race a claim; only one wins; audit row.

tasks.title: SLA timer + breach indicators
tasks.description: Per-queue SLA policies; computed remaining time; color-coded indicators.
tasks.details: Indicator color drawn from design-language status palette.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for SLA math; visual snapshot of breach state.

tasks.title: Keyboard shortcut overlay (?)
tasks.description: Modal listing all keyboard shortcuts; bound to `?`.
tasks.details: Accessible via screen reader.
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright: press `?`; modal renders; shortcuts work.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Ops staff complete a full case in console
tasks.description: Run two real cases through console end-to-end (recovery → prep → submission ready).
tasks.details: Time-track each stage to set baseline. Capture friction points as new tasks.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual + observation.

tasks.title: Cross-context lint rule + CI gate
tasks.description: ESLint custom rule blocks deep imports across `src/contexts/*` boundaries.
tasks.details: Imports must go through `contexts/<name>/index.ts` public surface.
tasks.testStrategy: Failing-import fixture in test repo causes CI failure.

tasks.title: Internal funnel metrics instrumentation
tasks.description: Wire screener → recovery → prep → concierge → paid funnel events to Axiom dashboard.
tasks.details: Per PRD 00 §9 metrics list. No third-party analytics on customer surfaces (privacy posture).
tasks.testStrategy: Trigger each event; query Axiom; values match.

tasks.title: USER-TEST: Phase 0 launch readiness review
tasks.description: Final gate: walk every flow as both customer and ops; confirm Checkpoint 4 criteria from PRD 11 met.
tasks.details: Full end-to-end: traffic → screener → recovery → prep → readiness → concierge → filed (manual mark). Confirm trust pages, lifecycle emails, audit log, and design language reviews all green.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual + checklist; sign-off from founder.

tasks.title: Phase 1 epic placeholder
tasks.description: Scope: side-by-side drag-region copy, outreach template library, reminder + stalled automation, internal notes + @-mentions, partner referral attribution + dashboard, mailbox forward integration, internal analytics dashboards.
tasks.details: Decompose into atomic tasks at start of Phase 1 (month 2).
tasks.testStrategy: TBD.

tasks.title: Phase 2 epic placeholder
tasks.description: Scope: OCR + LLM-assisted extraction, AI-drafted Readiness Report notes, triage assist, RAG knowledge surface, adaptive cadences, eval suite gates, per-case AI cost budgeting.
tasks.details: Use claude-api skill when implementing. Decompose at start of Phase 2 (month 4).
tasks.testStrategy: TBD.

tasks.title: Phase 3 epic placeholder
tasks.description: Scope: multi-tenant orgs everywhere with RLS, co-branded screener embeds, white-label for first design partner, multi-entity case linking, portfolio dashboards, enterprise approval workflows, SOC 2 Type I.
tasks.details: Decompose at start of Phase 3 (month 7).
tasks.testStrategy: TBD.
